About Me

Strategic thinker.
Data-driven by nature.

I'm Ale Emmanuel, a data analyst with a strong foundation in analytical thinking and a passion for transforming complex datasets into clear, actionable intelligence.

My approach combines business acumen with technical precision, I don't just surface insights, I frame them within commercial context so stakeholders know exactly what to do next. I focus on what matters most: growth, retention, and performance visibility.

Though early in my career, I bring the strategic mindset and analytical rigour of a seasoned professional. I've spent my time learning not just the tools, but how data creates measurable business value.

Strategic Thinking Business-First Analysis Growth Analytics Retention Modelling Self-Directed Learner

Case Studies

Strategic work.
Real outcomes.

Conceptual and framework-driven case studies demonstrating analytical thinking and commercial impact.

Conceptual
Retail · Growth Analytics · 2024
Revenue Growth Attribution for a D2C Retail Brand
Designed a multi-channel attribution model identifying which marketing channels drove highest-quality customers. Built a cohort analysis framework revealing email-acquired customers had 2.3× higher LTV than paid social, enabling a budget reallocation strategy that improved ROAS.
2.3×
LTV lift from email
+34%
Projected ROAS gain
12
KPI metrics defined
Conceptual
SaaS · Retention · Churn
Churn Reduction Framework for a B2B SaaS Product
Built a churn prediction scoring model using product engagement signals. Identified three distinct churn personas and designed targeted intervention sequences, projecting an 18% reduction in monthly churn rate.
−18%
Projected churn rate
3
Churn personas

E-commerce · Commercial Performance
Commercial Visibility Dashboard for E-commerce Operations
Designed a single-pane performance dashboard giving leadership full visibility across product categories, channels, and geographies replacing 6 weekly manual reports with one live view.

deliverable previews.

Power BI · Banking · Churn
Bank Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard
End-to-end churn intelligence across 10K customers segmented by tenure, product count, geography, age group, card type, and gender. Surfaces a 20.38% churn rate with retention breakdowns to guide targeted intervention strategy.
